pillars.title: Model Validation
pillars.description: Model validation enterprise learning and capability pillar.

topics.title: Model-Based Testing (MBT) in Software
topics.description: MBT is an automation technique where test cases are automatically generated from an abstract model (e.g., flowcharts, state diagrams, or UML diagrams) that represents how the system should behave.
topics.content: Early Defect Detection: Flaws are found during the design phase rather than the more expensive coding phase.Increased Coverage: Smart algorithms explore all system pathways, edge cases, and boundary conditions.Simplified Maintenance: When business logic or system requirements change, you update the model, and the test cases adjust automatically.Time Efficiency: Saves testing teams weeks of manual test writing by automatically generating scenarios.
